name: UptimeRobot
description: UptimeRobot monitors website and API uptime by checking endpoints at regular intervals and alerting on downtime. Create, manage, and query monitors for HTTP, keyword, ping, and port checks. All API requests use POST method with the API key in the request body.

capabilities.name: monitors_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve all monitors with their current status, uptime ratios, response times, and optional log history.

capabilities.name: monitor_create
capabilities.description: Create a new uptime monitor for a URL or IP address. Supports HTTP(s), keyword, ping, and port monitor types.

capabilities.name: monitor_edit
capabilities.description: Edit an existing monitor's settings including URL, friendly name, monitoring interval, and alert contacts.

capabilities.name: monitor_delete
capabilities.description: Permanently delete an existing monitor by its ID.

capabilities.name: monitor_reset
capabilities.description: Reset a monitor's statistics, clearing all collected uptime data and response times.

capabilities.name: alert_contacts_get
capabilities.description: List all alert contacts configured in the account, including email, SMS, webhook, and integration contacts.

capabilities.name: alert_contact_create
capabilities.description: Create a new alert contact for receiving downtime notifications via email, SMS, webhook, or integrations.

capabilities.name: alert_contact_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an existing alert contact by its ID.

capabilities.name: account_details_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve account information including plan type, monitor limits, and usage statistics.
